buyerNotes: Welcome to this beautifully upgraded ranch-style model home offering 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and peaceful pond views from a spacious corner lot. Light, bright, and thoughtfully designed for modern comfort, this home offers the perfect blend of serenity, functionality, and a warm ''feels like home'' atmosphere. From the inviting front porch to the sought-after open floor plan, every space is designed with comfortable living in mind. At the front of the home are three generous bedrooms, a full bath, and a convenient laundry room. The kitchen features quartz countertops, sleek backsplash, stainless steel appliances, an under-mount stainless sink, center island, cozy breakfast nook, and a walk-in pantry with a charming barn door. The private owner's suite is a relaxing retreat with an oversized walk-in closet, double vanities, frameless glass shower, and garden tub. Enjoy peaceful mornings or evenings on the covered patio overlooking the serene community pond. Originally built as a model home, this property is filled with professionally curated builder upgrades and designer touches throughout!

buyerNotes: Welcome to 367 Lake Sinclair Street, situated on arguably the best lot in all of St. Augustine Lakes. Perfectly positioned on an oversized lakefront homesite, this home offers peaceful sunrise views over the water, extra outdoor space, room for a future pool, and a level of privacy that is hard to find in a newer community. Built in 2023, the home was thoughtfully designed with high-end finishes throughout and has been meticulously cared for by the seller since day one. Inside, you’ll find a bright, modern layout with quality selections, clean finishes, and a true move-in-ready feel. The standout feature is the upgraded outdoor living space, thoughtfully designed to showcase the gorgeous lake view. The seller added a beautiful pavered patio, including a screened-in portion for relaxing comfortably year-round, plus an open-air extension that stretches toward the lake—perfect for grilling, entertaining, or enjoying quiet mornings with a view. The backyard also offers plenty of space to add a pool while still preserving the beautiful lakefront setting. St. Augustine Lakes is one of the area's hidden gems: a peaceful, quiet neighborhood tucked away from the busier parts of town, yet still within easy reach of historic downtown St. Augustine, shopping, dining, and the beaches. If you've been looking for a newer home with premium finishes, an exceptional lot, and a serene lakefront setting, this is the one! buyerNotes: Fresh, modern, and designed with everyday living in mind, this 2023 built home in the St. Augustine Lakes subdivision offers the perfect blend of space, flexibility, and style. Featuring 4 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, and 2,265 square feet of living space, this two-story layout gives everyone room to spread out while still feeling connected. Inside, the open concept living, dining, and kitchen area is bright and inviting, with tile flooring throughout the main spaces and a layout that flows effortlessly. The kitchen is ready to keep up with everything from quick weekday dinners to full on weekend cooking sessions, complete with a large island, ample cabinetry, and plenty of space to gather, snack, and maybe pretend you're on your own cooking show. The floor plan truly shines with its flexibility.

buyerNotes: Welcome to this beautifully built 2024 home offering 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and 2,202 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space in the heart of St. Augustine. With a modern open-concept layout and peaceful waterfront views, this home perfectly blends style, comfort, and convenience. The spacious kitchen is designed for both everyday living and entertaining, featuring tall white cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and a large center island that overlooks the dining area and living room—creating the perfect gathering space for family and friends. Natural light flows throughout the main living areas, enhancing the home’s bright and airy feel. Upstairs, all four bedrooms are privately tucked away, including a spacious primary suite designed for relaxation. Step outside to enjoy serene pond views from the fully fenced backyard, complete with a paver patio and pergola—ideal for outdoor dining, entertaining, or simply unwinding at the end of the day. Conveniently located less than 20 minutes from historic downtown St. Augustine, the Intracoastal Waterway, and Vilano Beach, this move-in ready home offers the best of Northeast Florida living with easy access to shopping, dining, beaches, and local attractions.

buyerNotes: Corner lot charm meets smart upgrades in this stunning 4-bedroom, 3-bath home with a spacious loft and 2,500 sq ft of thoughtfully designed living space. The rare 3-car garage offers flexibility for storage, hobbies, or multiple vehicles. Enjoy added value with installed gutters and a premium water filtration system delivering clean, high-quality drinking water. Located in the sought-after Cordova Palms community, residents enjoy resort-style amenities including a clubhouse, pool, fitness center, playground, and more. Zoned for top-rated St. Johns County schools, this home offers the perfect blend of space, upgrades, and lifestyle in one of the area's fastest-growing communities.

Located in the sought-after Entrada community, this tenant occupied home features tile and LVP flooring throughout for a sleek and durable finish. The spacious fully fenced backyard boasts a pavered patio overlooking the pond, creating the perfect spot to relax and unwind.

As a natural gas home, energy efficiency is key--plus, it includes transferable lease solar payments to help keep costs down. Enjoy resort-style amenities such as a pool, lap pool, pickleball courts, and a basketball court, all designed for an active and social lifestyle. Ask about the FHA assumable loan at 5.125%!

Currently a lease has been signed through December 2026. Perfect for an investor looking for a property with a tenant in place!

address: 210 White Rabbit Run St, Saint Augustine, FL 32092
buyerNotes: Modern living meets North Florida charm! This spacious 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom Lennar Home located in the vibrant, amenity-rich Trailmark neighborhood has a split floor plan that provides thoughtful separation between the owner's suite and the secondary bedrooms with daily life centered around a spacious Great Room that opens directly onto a screened lanai with peaceful water views. The kitchen shines with quartz countertops, 42-inch cabinetry, a generous center island, corner accessible pantry, and stainless steel appliances including a gas range. Ceramic wood tile flows through the main living areas, and a pre-wired security system bring modern convenience to every corner. A dedicated fourth bedroom suite with its own private bath offers flexible space for a variety of uses. Thoughtful upgrades include ceramic wood tile throughout main living areas, a pavered driveway, and a gas tankless water heater for energy savings. Trailmark residents enjoy an impressive lineup of amenities, including resort-style and lap pools, a fitness center, dog park, kayak launch, sports courts, play areas, and miles of multi-use trails.
verifyBeforeOffer: Open House Sunday 11 AM - 2 PM

buyerNotes: Discover a former model home in the master-planned TrailMark community where thoughtful design, exceptional amenities and breathtaking natural views come together. This beautifully appointed home features an open concept floor plan that connects the living, dining and kitchen spaces, creating the perfect setting for everyday living and entertaining. Large windows fill the home with natural light and a double patio door showcase the pond and preserve views providing a peaceful and private backdrop. Living areas flow to the screened lanai, and fenced yard where you can relax while taking in the picturesque scenery. The home also features a large kitchen island with quartz counters and stainless-steel appliances, two primary walk-in closets, a teen/flex space, surround sound system and custom window treatments. The community's recreation focus and resort-style amenities include a clubhouse, pool, sports courts, playgrounds, miles of walking and biking trails and kayak launch.

The Stockton II is ready soon and offers a thoughtfully designed layout with the primary bedroom conveniently located on the first floor. This beautiful home features a gourmet kitchen. Wooden stair spindles add a stylish touch, while the upstairs layout offers 3 additional bedrooms, a full bath, and an amazing loft area that provides flexible living space. Situated on a desirable preserve lot, this home offers added privacy and a peaceful natural backdrop. Trailmark is a beautiful, secluded community in the growing St. Johns County area, known for impressive oak tree hammocks, winding nature trails, and architectural design inspired by Old Florida style. Conveniently located near I-95, highly regarded schools, and just a short drive to historic St. Augustine. Estimated completion is September. To gain entrance to this home and learn more about available buyer incentives, please visit the model center.
verifyBeforeOffer: New Construction - Covered Patio and Entrance - Extra $$.  Open House - Fri 1 PM - 5 PM, Saturday & Sunday Same

address: 82 TREE FROG Way, St. Augustine, FL 32095
buyerNotes:
Incredible views, outstanding amenities, shopping and everything you will love that comes along with this beautiful 5 bedroom home in St. Johns County! ** 2026 property tax credit attached to this home- best price per sq ft value in the neighborhood! 5 bedroom home with 3 full bathrooms in St. Johns County with a LOW CDD fee of $108.98 a month! and a LOW HOA fee of $101.67 per month! Live the Lifestyle in this stunning 5 bedroom, 3.5 bath home with an additional second floor flex space, now on the market in Florida's top school district. Located in the highly sought after Twin Creeks at Creekside community in St. Johns County, this move in ready home has been immaculately maintained, and the pride of ownership shines throughout. This property truly offers it all, from location to upgrades, with close proximity to dining, shopping, and major highways, plus a rare fully fenced, pond view lot featuring a built in fire pit and extended paver patio, perfect for outdoor entertaining. This "move right in" home features brand new carpet, an oversized first floor primary suite, and a beautifully designed interior filled with thoughtful upgrades throughout. The primary suite showcases a custom design accent wall, built in closet shelving, and a spa inspired bath with a frameless shower glass.

The bright, upgraded white kitchen offers a quiet layout ideal for busy households, highlighted by crown molded cabinetry, quartz countertops with tasteful marbling, a gas cooktop, and a reverse osmosis hookup to the refrigerator, ideal for everyday living and entertaining. Additional highlights include a half bath on the main level, a walk in laundry room, and ceiling fans in every room. Upstairs offers a versatile flex space along with bedrooms 2, 3, 4, and 5, providing exceptional space for family, guests, or a home office. Notable upgrades and features include permanent holiday exterior lighting, a water softener system, a solar-powered attic ventilation fan, a fully fenced backyard overlooking the pond, a built in fire pit, extended pavers, and a white kitchen upgrade with crown molding.

INVESTORS ONLY! Potential investment opportunity in Trailmark. Tenant in place with 1.5-year lease. Begin earning immediately.This beautifully upgraded Dream Finders Mabelton floorplan offers luxury finishes, thoughtful custom details, and an incredible location within one of St. Johns County's most sought-after master-planned communities.

Inside, you'll find quartz countertops, upgraded cabinetry with soft-close drawers and cabinets, a porcelain farmhouse sink, pot filler, custom shiplap accents, designer lighting, luxury vinyl plank flooring, custom built-ins, and an impressive entertainment wall with fireplace. Additional upgrades include a smart lock system, water softener and filtration system, gutters, fence, garage storage, and more.

Trailmark residents enjoy resort-style amenities, kayak launch access, fitness center, trails, sports courts, dog park, and community events throughout the year. 1 Bedroom on ground floor, Primary and 2 additional bedrooms on second floor.

Additional highlights include tray ceilings in the primary suite, upgraded laundry room with custom shelving, built-in hallway tree, custom office barn door, upgraded fixtures throughout, gemstone exterior lighting system, AC air ionizer, and overhead garage storage.

The Trailmark lifestyle is one of the biggest draws to this community. Residents enjoy miles of walking and biking trails woven through preserved natural surroundings, along with a lakeside camp house, resort-style pool, fitness center, play fields, sports courts, dog park, kayak launch, and year-round neighborhood events.
